scripts.test:state-explorer: playwright test tests/state-tool.spec.js --grep "drops state explorer presets|stores reusable states|adds and uses state explorer presets|updates, deletes|reuses state explorer presets|keeps state editor focus" --reporter=list
scripts.test:state-render: playwright test tests/core-contracts.spec.js --grep "component data rendering|repeat sources|data wires drive|state editor exposes|state data card|global-state json paths|global state json tree|repeat over" --reporter=list && playwright test tests/state-tool.spec.js --grep "renders state data defaults|state data defaults flow|inspects JSON endpoints|keeps data-wire paths|shows outgoing transition buttons" --reporter=list
